_source.name: Screener Trades modal
_source.path: Screener → Niva Bupa → Investors / Shareholding / Trades modal → Block Deals tab
_source.captured_by: Neha — read from the Screener trades modal (Block Deals tab); the modal is login-gated, so this is the dated source-of-record until a live Screener session is configured (SCREENER_SESSIONID).
_source.note: Bulk deals come from the aggregated NSE/BSE snapshot; this file carries the Block Deals tab, which is otherwise login-gated. Action normalised on read: B → buy, Sale → sell. dealValueCr = quantity × price / 1,00,00,000.
